tips: Favor composition over inheritance for flexible code architectures
Use dependency injection to make code testable and decoupled
Follow the Single Responsibility Principle — one module, one reason to change
Keep functions pure when possible — same input always produces same output
Use the Strategy pattern to swap algorithms at runtime
Separate concerns: IO, business logic, and presentation should be distinct layers
Use the Observer pattern for event-driven architectures
Don't repeat yourself (DRY) — extract shared logic into reusable modules
Encapsulate what varies — isolate volatile code behind stable interfaces
Use the Factory pattern to create objects without specifying concrete classes
Prefer small, focused modules over large monolithic files
